Interface IMultiblockInfoContainer<T>

public interface IMultiblockInfoContainer<T>
To implement IConstructable on not own TileEntities

  • Method Details

    • registerTileClass

      static <T extends TileEntity> void registerTileClass(Class<T> clazz, IMultiblockInfoContainer<?> info)
      There is no specific loading phase restriction, but you should generally not call it before the tile entity is properly registered.

      Construct the structure using IStructureElement.survivalPlaceBlock(Object, World, int, int, int, ItemStack, AutoPlaceEnvironment)
      Returns:
      -1 if done, a helping pointer
